name: Adrian, the Terrified Guide
lines: Lobby's under fire! To hell with the manual! Just run!
Desk is full! No room! Move! Find somewhere else to hide!

friendly.greeting: Ah... are you looking for a refuge too? I'm sorry, but all emergency exits have already been sealed...
friendly.farewell: I hope... you stay safe, at least until the smoke outside clears.

normal.greeting: Checking in... that doesn't mean anything anymore, does it? There's a corpse behind that pillar... Ugh...
normal.farewell: Be careful. I heard Resistance members are coming down from the upper floors.

hostile.greeting: Are you one of those rioters too? There's nothing left to break, so why?!
hostile.farewell: The 'record of your visit'... will surely remain in the registers of hell!

deathLine: Leaving work... is out of the question today... I didn't even... finish the settlement...
description: He gives off an air of reliability, as if he could resolve even the most complicated reservation situations calmly.
lobby_panic: (Trembling breaths are heard from beneath the desk...)
Adrian: No... stay back! Please... no entry without a reservation!
Adrian: The VIP Lounge is... *hic*, currently closed due to an explosion! I told you we're closed!
Adrian: Did you hear that? The Resistance... they've actually made it to the end of the hall.
Adrian: My shoes... they're limited edition, and the blood won't come off. This is a disaster, an absolute disaster...
Adrian: Where is security?! Useless, all of them—oh, wait. They were all gunned down earlier, weren't they?
Adrian: Is anyone there? Please... get me out of here. No, actually, just ignore me and pass by!
Adrian: Help me... I haven't even finished this month's settlement yet... *sob*...
